Any recommendations in which posse I should unlock first?

Sea Festival, +2 Arithmetica and card draw, obtainable in a side story of the Dreamscape. (Desecrate.)
Resolve of the Mountains, draw 2 cards of a specific character, obtainable in the story of Helot - Catena.
Crossing the Door of Retrospection, adds one card of a specific character and reduce it's cost by 1, obtainable in the side story of Loop - Ramona.
